edits.slides.8.content: Tap targets sized for gloved hands. Nothing essential could depend on hover.
edits.slides.8.issues.0: Three surfaces: scanner hardware (Element, Lumina), MIDC desktop, and myitero.com
edits.slides.8.issues.1: Compatible with in-progress cases on the old Rx
edits.slides.8.issues.2: Feature-flagged — no persistent onboarding; learnable on first contact
edits.slides.8.issues.3: Read and demo states designed in from day one
edits.slides.8.issues.4: M&I and Labs out of scope — IA built to absorb them
edits.slides.19.content: Multi-visit cases need more than one scan. Clinicians had to track changes between appointments. Pre- and post-treatment scans sit in tabs, with overlay and adjustable opacity.
edits.slides.19.bullets2.2: What clinicians held in memory, now visible on screen
